name: Bluesky
description: Read & post on Bluesky (the AT Protocol social network) from any AI agent. 9 tools, app-password auth.
instructions:
This connector wraps the Bluesky AT Protocol XRPC API (bsky.social).

**Setup**:
1. In the Bluesky app or web client → **Settings → Privacy and Security → App Passwords → Add App Password**.
2. Name it (e.g. 'mcp') and copy the generated `xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx` password. App passwords scope down what they can do — never use your account password.
3. Set `BLUESKY_HANDLE` (e.g. `you.bsky.social`) and `BLUESKY_APP_PASSWORD`.

**Two-step auth**: AT Protocol uses a session model. You can't just send the app password on every call — you must first POST to `/xrpc/com.atproto.server.createSession` with `{identifier, password}` and use the returned `accessJwt` as the Bearer token. The `bluesky_create_session` tool does step 1; subsequent tools use the JWT.

For production use the access JWT should be cached (it lasts ~2 hours) and refreshed with `refreshJwt` via `/xrpc/com.atproto.server.refreshSession`. This adapter exposes session create + refresh as tools so the caller can manage lifecycle.

**DIDs vs handles**: Bluesky internally uses DIDs (`did:plc:abcd...`). Public APIs accept either DID or handle (`you.bsky.social`); use `bluesky_resolve_handle` to convert.

**Post records**: posts are AT Protocol records of type `app.bsky.feed.post`. They have `text` (max 300 graphemes), `createdAt` (RFC3339), `langs[]`, and optional `embed` for images/links.

**Rate limits**: 5k req / hour per JWT; create-session limited to 30/5min per IP. 429 with `Retry-After`.

**Out of scope here**: image upload multipart (use the public URL embed pattern instead), labelers/moderation, custom feeds CRUD, DM (separate API), the firehose.

tools.name: bluesky_create_session
tools.description: Exchange handle + app password for an access JWT (lasts ~2h) and refresh JWT. Returns `accessJwt`, `refreshJwt`, `handle`, `did`. Call this once at the start of a session, then pass `accessJwt` to other tools that need it.

tools.name: bluesky_refresh_session
tools.description: Refresh an access JWT using the refresh JWT.

tools.name: bluesky_resolve_handle
tools.description: Resolve a Bluesky handle (e.g. `bsky.app`) to its DID. Public, no auth needed.

tools.name: bluesky_get_profile
tools.description: Get a user's public profile: handle, did, displayName, description, followers, follows, posts count, avatar URL.

tools.name: bluesky_get_timeline
tools.description: Get the authenticated user's home timeline (chronological feed of follows). Paginated.

tools.name: bluesky_get_author_feed
tools.description: Get posts by a specific user (their public feed).

tools.name: bluesky_create_post
tools.description: Post a new skeet. `text` is required (max 300 graphemes). Returns the post's URI + CID.

created_at.description: RFC3339 datetime (defaults to now if omitted).

tools.name: bluesky_delete_post
tools.description: Delete one of your own posts by its rkey (record key, the last segment of the at:// URI).

rkey.description: Record key — the last segment of the post's at:// URI.
